info.name: CMP / TCCR Backend — Full API
info.description:
Complete API collection for CMP/TCCR (slp-backend). V1 + V2 endpoints across 10 microservices.

Test flow:
1. Run 🔐 Sign In folder first to populate tokens
2. Run folders in order — each saves IDs for the next

Local env: CMP_Local (emulator)
Online env: CMP_Online (production)

request.description: Creates a new Cell Leader account directly (bypasses self-registration). Caller must be g12, admin, or super_admin. A welcome email is sent to the new user with their credentials, a Firebase password-reset link, and the system URL.
G12 leader provisioning a new G12 account. Roles: g12, admin, super_admin. Welcome email is sent with credentials + password-reset link + system URL.
A student/member cannot create users directly. Expects 403 Forbidden.
Admin adds/removes a role on any user. Allowed roles: admin, super_admin, g12.

exec: pm.test("204 — admin can assign role", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

item.name: Assign Role — g12 adds g12 to leader (g12 caller)

request.description: G12 leader may add the g12 role to a leader. Callers: admin, super_admin, g12 only — leader is NOT allowed.

exec: pm.test("204 — g12 can add g12 role to a leader", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

request.description: Leader is not in the allowed roles list for PATCH /users/:uid/roles — expect 403.

exec: pm.test("403 — leader cannot call assign-role", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

request.description: Expect 204 — g12 can promote a member to leader

exec: pm.test("204 — g12 promotes member to leader", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

request.description: Expect 204 — g12 can promote a member to g12

exec: pm.test("204 — g12 promotes member to g12", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

request.description: Expect 204 — g12 can promote a leader to g12

exec: pm.test("204 — g12 promotes leader to g12", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

request.description: Expect 204 — leader can promote a member to g12

exec: pm.test("204 — leader promotes member to g12", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

request.description: Expect 403 — leaders cannot grant the leader role

exec: pm.test("403 — leader cannot grant leader role", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

request.description: Expect 403 — members are not allowed to call this endpoint

exec: pm.test("403 — member cannot call promote", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: 🔧  Setup — Published Course (for Batches / Enrollment / Progress)
List Batches for Course

exec: pm.test("200 — admin can list batches (auth now required)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.description: Requires authentication. Any authenticated role allowed. Changed from optional auth.

item.name: List Batches for Course — student caller

exec: pm.test("200 — student can list batches (any authenticated)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.description: Verify non-admin access after auth fix.

item.name: Create Batch (past open date → auto OPEN)
Get Batch by ID

item.description: Requires authentication. Any authenticated role allowed. Changed from optional auth.

exec: pm.test("201 — student can enroll (student, leader, g12 allowed)", () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test("200 — student can see own enrollments", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 — leader can see own enrollments", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: File Cell Report (multipart — data + inline photos)

body.raw:
{
  "date": "2026-05-20",
  "didMeet": true,
  "leaderPresent": true,
  "location": "Church Hall",
  "timeStarted": "18:00",
  "timeEnded": "20:00",
  "language": "en",
  "subjectDiscussed": "sunday_sermon",
  "attendance": [
    { "name": "John Doe", "status": "present", "isNew": false },
    { "name": "New Visitor", "status": "present", "isNew": true }
  ],
  "contactedAbsentees": "no",
  "satisfactionRate": 4,
  "additionalVisitors": 1,
  "childrenCount": 0,
  "photoUrls": ["{{reportPhotoUrl}}"],
  "clientReqId": "{{$guid}}"
}
